basis: CIF NWE prompt delivery — physical crude
source: Editorial estimate · trade press (Reuters, Bloomberg, Argus)
note: Physical crude still holds a premium over Brent futures — a market kept tight by constrained Hormuz transits and restricted Gulf shipping. The early-June Israeli strike on Iran's Mahshahr petrochemical complex put a fresh war premium back into prompt physical barrels, even as paper prices stayed volatile on diplomacy headlines.
